description: Madhya Pradesh Paramedical Council is a statutory body of the Government of Madhya Pradesh related to paramedical education, registration, and affiliated institutions. Its website publishes council information, notifications, regulations, and links to service workflows hosted elsewhere.
summary: mppmc.ac.in exposes a public informational website only; no developer-facing API, GraphQL endpoint, MCP server, or CLI was found on mppmc.ac.in itself.
